title: Micro USB Cable,Android charger cable fast charging cable1M Braided Micro USB Charger cable Compatible with Samsung S7/S6/S5, HTC, Huawei, Sony, Nexus, Nokia, Tablet,PS4 and More
features: 【Micro USB Wide Compatibility】:this android charger cable for smartphones, tablets and other devices with Micro USB Ports like Samsung Galaxy S7 Edge S6 S5 S3 J3 J5 J6 J7 A6 A7 A10, Samsung Note 5/4/3, Samsung Tab A 8.0/Tab A 10.1 (2016)/Tab A 9.7/Tab A 7.0/Tab E 9.6/Tab E 8.0/Tab S2 8.0/Tab S2 9.7/Tab 4, Huawei P Smart, LG, HTC, Nexus, Sony, Xbox one, PS4 Controller and more. (✘✘✘Important Notes: This is USB 2.0 A-Male to Micro B Cable, NOT compatible with any iPhone or USB Type-C devices.)

【Unique color Micro USB Cable】: With this fast charge micro usb charging cable of fashionable ocean blue makes you feel the vastness and freshness of the sea.Leading the fashion trend at the same time

【Fast Charging and Sync】:This samsung micro usb charger cable supports the speed by delivering 5V/2.4A safe charging current and 480Mbps data transfer rate compared with other usb cables. Enjoy fast charging by using original wall charger.

【Strong Nylon-braided Charger Lead】:With the protection of the durable nylon-braided jacket, our USB micro cables have 10000+ bend lifespan and are also free of tangle. The extended design of the cable end provides better protection against breakage over the years of use. Moreover, the premium aluminum-alloy housing not only offers better protection but also give it a fashionable look.

[3D Aluminum Alloy Connector] With improved 3D aluminum connector and exclusive laser welding technology, which ensures that the metal part of this micro usb cable does not break off and also has a stronger connection, which fits well even with a protective cover and never a loose connection.
description: Product Description Micro USB Cable Android tablet charger cable 1M Item: micro usb charger android cable Material: Nylon Braided + Aluminum Color: Ocean blue Data Transfer Speed: 480Mbps The micro usb cable is made with upgraded hook never remove off when it's charging. Superior Durability This micro usb charger cable can withstand over 10,000 bends and 10,000 insertions. Reinforced with a nylon braided outer sheath and robust aluminum connector housings, it has been engineered for extreme durability.
